name: kinesica-site
description: Static site tooling (CSS purge audit, scripts)

scripts.reviews:refresh: npm run reviews:fetch && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:pt-static: node scripts/bootstrap-pt-pages.mjs && node scripts/apply-lang-meta.mjs && node scripts/build-articulos-pages.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs
scripts.build:pt: node scripts/build-cv-html.mjs && npm run build:pt-static && node scripts/build-schema-partials.mjs && npm run build:partials && npm run seo:sitemap && npm run seo:llms && npm run assets:build && npm run verify
scripts.build:cv: node scripts/build-cv-html.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:seo: npm run seo:schema && npm run schema:partials && npm run seo:llms && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:pathologies: node scripts/sync-pathology-header-labels.mjs && node scripts/build-pathology-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-article-thumbnails.mjs && node scripts/build-articulos-pages.mjs && node scripts/sync-nav-articles-menu.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && node scripts/verify-pathology-pages.mjs && npm run assets:build && node scripts/apply-seo-performance.mjs && npm run seo:sitemap
scripts.migrate:header: node scripts/migrate-header-shell.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:articulos: node scripts/generate-article-thumbnails.mjs && node scripts/build-articulos-pages.mjs && node scripts/sync-nav-articles-menu.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
scripts.build:404: node scripts/build-404-pages.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && node scripts/apply-seo-performance.mjs
scripts.build:home: node scripts/build-home-pages.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && node scripts/verify-home-pages.mjs && npm run assets:build && node scripts/apply-seo-performance.mjs && npm run seo:sitemap && npm run seo:llms
scripts.build:methods: node scripts/build-method-pages.mjs && node scripts/inject-local-schema.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && node scripts/verify-method-pages.mjs && npm run assets:build && node scripts/apply-seo-performance.mjs
scripts.sync:nav-articles: node scripts/sync-nav-articles-menu.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
scripts.migrate:cta: node scripts/migrate-cta-strip.mjs && node scripts/normalize-cta-strip.mjs && node scripts/inject-static-shell.mjs && npm run assets:build
